results.title: Sunsure Energy commissions 105 MWp solar plant in Mahoba; kicks off Uttar Pradesh’s first green power evacuation under Green Energy Corridor-II
results.description: Kabrai Project, commissioned in record 4 months, takes Sunsure’s operational capacity in UP to 365 MWp NEW DELHI, May 30, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Sunsure Energy, India’s preferred Round-the-Clock renewable energy solutions provider for leading businesses and utilities, today announced that it has commissioned the 105 MWp project in Uttar Pradesh’s Mahoba District in record 4 months [...]
